title: Minimalist Dark Academic Workspace Setup
description: Reviewing three core developer desk accessories to style your home office for maximum coding focus.
content:
Having a clean, productive workspace is essential for long coding sessions. In this blog post, we break down a stunning dark academic desk setup that balances aesthetics with functional comfort.

## The Core Accessories

Here are the top three items that will elevate your setup:

### 1. Keychron K2 Mechanical Keyboard
The tactile typing experience with Mac and Windows compatibility makes it a joy to type on.

### 2. BenQ ScreenBar Monitor Light
Clamps to your monitor to illuminate your workspace without reflecting glare off your screen.

### 3. Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
Comfortable ergonomics, customizable buttons, and fluid scrolling across codebases.

products.name: Keychron K2 Version 2 Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: A 75% layout wireless mechanical keyboard with Gateron switches and solid aluminum frame.

products.name: BenQ ScreenBar Monitor LED Light
products.description: Auto-dimming computer monitor light bar that eliminates screen glare, saving desk space.
